As Merlin, my priority is to prevent Evil from sabotaging the quest, even if it means rejecting my own proposed team. This vote reveals my awareness of the Evil players, helping the team avoid a doomed mission.
Player 1: As a Servant, my goal is to protect the team and ensure quest success. The proposed team [0, 2, 4] includes players who have previously led to mixed outcomes, but without clear evidence of their roles, approving this team aligns with supporting the majority vote and progressing the quest. Rejecting might delay the quest unnecessarily.
